title: CHCP
description: Copy chat messages and screenshots to your clipboard
body:
---
  # CHCP — Chat & Screenshot Clipboard
  # VIEW GALLARY

  A client-side mod that lets you copy chat messages and screenshots directly
  to your clipboard with a single click.

  ## Features

  ### Chat Copy
  - **Click to copy** — Hold your configured modifier key and left-click any
    chat line to copy it as plain text
  - **Range selection** — Click a start line, then click an end line to copy
    multiple lines at once
  - **Copy as image** — Right-click a chat line (with modifier held) to copy
    it as a transparent PNG image, perfect for sharing
  - **Copy mode** — Choose between copying the full line or message text only
    (strips sender prefix)

  ### Screenshot
  - **Per-screenshot copy** — Every screenshot notification in chat includes
    an `[Open]` and `[Copy]` button, each linked to that specific screenshot
  - **Hover preview** — Hover over the "Screenshot" text in chat to see a
    thumbnail preview, filename, and timestamp
  - **Keybinding** — Bind a key to instantly copy the latest screenshot to
    your clipboard

  ## Configuration
  Open the settings screen via ModMenu or the keybind to configure:
  - Modifier key for single copy (`Ctrl` / `Alt` / `Shift`)
  - Modifier key for range selection
  - Copy mode (message only / full line)

  ---
